name: Crimson Guard
description: A cuirass originally built to protect against the dreaded Year Beast.

abilities.name: Guard
abilities.description: Grants nearby allied heroes and buildings a guaranteed chance to block a fixed portion of physical attack damage, plus a portion based on the caster's max health. Cooldown: 40. Mana Cost: 75. Radius: 1200. Proc Chance: 100%. Base Blocked Damage: 70/45. Max Health as Blocked Damage: 2%.

abilities.name: Damage Block
abilities.description: Grants the wielder a chance to block a fixed portion of physical attack damage. Proc Chance: 60%. Blocked Damage: 75. Blocked Damage: 50.
